title: WorkerRequest
description: Request payload for invoking a worker.

correlation_id.description: Optional correlation identifier for tracing requests across transports.

payload_json.description: JSON-encoded payload forwarded to the worker; the ABI treats this as opaque.

session_id.description: Optional session identifier for conversational workers.

tenant.description: Tenant context propagated to the worker.

thread_id.description: Optional thread identifier when the worker groups messages into threads.

timestamp_utc.description: UTC timestamp for when the request was created (ISO8601).

version.description: Version of the worker envelope (for example `1.0`).

worker_id.description: Identifier of the target worker (for example `greentic-repo-assistant`).

EnvId.description: Environment identifier for a tenant context.

Impersonation.description: Metadata describing an impersonated user acting on behalf of the main identity.

actor_id.description: Identifier of the user performing the impersonation.

InvocationDeadline.description: Deadline metadata for an invocation, stored as Unix epoch milliseconds.

TeamId.description: Team identifier belonging to a tenant.

TenantCtx.description: Context that accompanies every invocation across Greentic runtimes.

attempt.description: Attempt counter for retried invocations (starting at zero).

attributes.description: Free-form attributes for routing and tracing.

correlation_id.description: Correlation identifier for linking related events.

deadline.description: Deadline when the invocation should finish.

flow_id.description: Optional flow identifier for the current execution.

i18n_id.description: Optional locale/translation identifier for the session.

idempotency_key.description: Stable idempotency key propagated across retries.

impersonation.description: Optional impersonation context describing the acting identity.

node_id.description: Optional node identifier within the flow.

provider_id.description: Optional provider identifier describing the runtime surface.

session_id.description: Optional session identifier propagated by the runtime.

team.description: Optional team identifier scoped to the tenant.

team_id.description: Optional team identifier accessible via the shared schema.

tenant.description: Tenant identifier for the current execution.

tenant_id.description: Stable tenant identifier reference used across systems.

user.description: Optional user identifier scoped to the tenant.

user_id.description: Optional user identifier aligned with the shared schema.
